title: phegopteris subdigitata
intro: Phegopteris subdigitata, also known as the small maiden fern or maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Phegopteris subdigitata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory issues, and support liver function. Herbal preparations of Phegopteris subdigitata can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying and powdering the leaves for use in capsules or tinctures.
